market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Modern riverside flat with sea views
analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the tranquility of our modern riverside flat, nestled in a picturesque location with breathtaking views of the river. This entire home is perfect for 4 guests, offering a comfortable and relaxing stay. Fitted with all the essentials for a great vacation, the apartment boasts a well-equipped kitchen, a spacious living area, and a balcony where you can soak up the sun and enjoy the surrounding views. With a rich history and culture surrounding the area, there's always something to explore and discover. Our riverside flat is a hidden gem, waiting to be experienced. Please note that the apartment is not suitable for parties or events. A non-smoking environment is also requested. Check-in is at 4 PM, and check-out is at 10 AM. A deposit will be charged in case of any damages or excessive cleaning required.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor spaces (such as a garden or balcony) for guests to relax and enjoy
Parking facilities for guests with vehicles
Entertainment options (such as a TV or games)
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should be the balcony view to showcase the apartment's unique selling point. This will attract guests who are looking for a relaxing stay with a view.
key_diagnosis: Their nightly rate of £270 is +54% vs the cohort median of £175, suggesting a pricing strategy that may be too high for the current market (vs median)
The apartment is underbooked at 15.2% occupancy vs the cohort median of 28.3%, indicating a room for improvement in terms of marketing or competitiveness
There are no images, which will not build trust or showcase the apartment's unique features, suggesting a high-impact fix to add at least 3-5 photos ASAP
analysis.outreach_hook: We noticed that your Modern riverside flat with a balcony has a high nightly rate of £270, but only 15.2% occupancy over the next 90 days - we'd love to discuss how we can help improve your competitiveness and bookings
